creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
Build-specific pages now work but new_failed (plus number) never changes *between* builds except when Failed (absolute number) also changes. Most noticible with "quarterly" where Failed rarely changes. Looks as if previous_build is stuck in early November 2023. In short, still unusable from ports/ committer POV.

See also https://github.com/bdrewery/pkg-status.freebsd.org/blob/master/gather_to_mongo.py#L98-L102
